theme.description: Bloomberg-terminal-meets-modern-editorial. Serious trader's command center with high data density. Risk is real ($800 real money), therefore the aesthetics are highly professional, rigid, dark terminal-inspired. Avoid generic SaaS look. Color is function only.

layout.spacing_system: Dense and compact. Use p-4 or p-6 for containers to maximize data density on screen. Avoid overly generous whitespace for data panels.
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel must be utilized with 100% height stretching. Panels fit together like a masonry layout or exact bento.
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders: expose the skeleton. Container with border-collapse or 1px subtle borders. Use sharp edges or max 4px border-radius. No soft shadows.
layout.alignment: Left-align data arrays and tabular content. Number values right-aligned. Optical alignment for icons.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI base. Strip out generic card rounded corners, make them 0px to 4px. Use Shadcn charts/Recharts for visual data. Highly customized data tables and forms for inputs. The overall feel is rigid and technical.
components.buttons: Flat solid surfaces. Hover states must have a lighter hue and strong contrast. Primary CTAs use Accent Green or Accent Blue. Use sharp 0-4px border radius.
components.panels: Terminal look with solid #121212 background with 1px border. No glassmorphism to avoid distraction and maintain readability.
components.navigation: Sticky left sidebar or dense top fixed header with solid dark background.
components.instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'JetBrains Mono' is used for all numbers, prices, risk percentages, and code blocks. 'Chivo' or 'IBM Plex Sans' for descriptive text. Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

motion.rules: Minimalist. Micro-interactions for feedback on buttons and rows. No extravagant scroll animations or parallax. The data needs to feel real-time and instant.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark technical financial background, glowing chart lines
Close up of abstract raw data terminal, deep dark monochrome charcoal
close up of a computer screen with a chart on it

sections: Hero/Overview: Top bar showing capital ($800), Risk Status, Open Positions (Max 1), Today's Market.
MCP Architecture: Terminal-styled section explaining 4 MCPs (News, Trading-MT5, Tech Analysis, Risk) with copy-paste prompts for Claude Desktop.
Strategies Catalog: Grid of valid setups (intraday, overnight). R:R, win rate targets.
Strict Rules Panel: Red/Amber tinted panel showing non-negotiable rules (1-2% risk, max drawdown, news blackout).
Daily Checklist: Interactive checkboxes for pre-market, during, post-market.
Risk Calculator: Interactive tool (Balance, Risk %, SL pips -> Lot Size).
Trade Journal: Table logging trades, historical view, performance stats.
Setup Guide: Markdown-styled doc panel for WSL+MT5+Claude setup.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute. Format: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='trade-submit-button', data-testid='risk-percentage-value'.
